headline: Anthropic deploys Claude Mythos across critical infrastructure in 15 nations
body: Anthropic has scaled Claude Mythos to critical infrastructure systems across 15 countries, marking significant expansion of the model's real-world deployment. This development arrives amid broader industry momentum around large language models handling mission-critical workloads, though concurrent discussions about AI safety in autonomous systems underscore persistent vendor scrutiny. For healthcare AI specifically, this deployment pattern signals accelerating confidence in Claude-based infrastructure for regulated environments. Healthcare organizations evaluating AI vendors should monitor how Anthropic's critical infrastructure credentials translate to clinical deployment readiness, particularly around EHR integration, compliance frameworks, and failure safeguards that differ substantially from general enterprise use cases.
